generated_from: expo/docs/pages/eas/observe/* + monitoring/services.mdx @ 2026-06-07; HARDENED (light variants confirmed by eye; dark variants are the ContentSpotlight `darkSrc` twins of those same screens). Route confirmed from universe (SidebarLinks.tsx:214-221, helpers.ts:219): EAS Observe is project-scoped at /accounts/[account]/projects/[project]/observe with client-side tabs. The docs link the tabs via query params (?tab=events, ?tab=eas-update); universe also exposes /observe/events + /observe/metrics + /observe/sessions sub-routes, so if a ?tab= URL stops resolving, try the sub-route. 4 distinct screens, each shipped as a light+dark pair = 8 entries, all auto-capture (top-level page + tabs, no reach). observe-dashboard and observe (intro) are the SAME App-startup screen at different crops. PROJECT must have EAS Observe enabled with production session data + builds + published updates, else the tabs render empty/zero-state and compare as unsure; if the default project has no Observe data, pass --project=<slug>. Observe is feature-gated (useObserveFeatureGate) so the project's account must have the feature.

screenshots.depicts: EAS Observe dashboard, App startup view: cold/warm launch startup metrics with release markers and statistical breakdowns, full page with sidebar
screenshots.scope_note: Observe landing (App startup tab is the default). Reachable read-only. THEME confirmed light by eye (white chrome, blue startup charts). Needs a project with Observe production session data, else the charts are empty.

screenshots.depicts: EAS Observe dashboard, App startup view (dark theme): cold/warm launch startup metrics with release markers
screenshots.scope_note: Dark-theme twin of observe-dashboard-light (the ContentSpotlight darkSrc), same screen captured in dark mode. Needs Observe production session data.

screenshots.scope_note: Same Observe App-startup screen as observe-dashboard, cropped to the cold/warm launch cards (intro page). THEME confirmed light by eye. Compare ignores cropping.

screenshots.scope_note: Dark-theme twin of observe-light (ContentSpotlight darkSrc), same App-startup screen in dark mode.

screenshots.scope_note: Events tab. Doc links ?tab=events; universe also has /observe/events. THEME confirmed light by eye. Needs the app to emit logEvent data, else the table is empty.
